goal: Culture Calendar code change: deliver the task while preserving AI-review quality (evidence-grounded, category-specific reviews) and nanochat-style repo minimalism.
_note: Cross-family panel, Anthropic excluded (maker family). Each juror a distinct family per the llm-council family-exclusion invariant. Model slugs come from the skill's cache/model-pool.json (refreshed 2026-05-28); refresh with refresh-model-pool.py and re-pick when the frontier moves. persona_spec_path is relative to the repo root (council-judge.sh is invoked there in every gate).
